vertical_slice_goal: Polish hero animation across the five built worlds (idle motion, thin sets, weapon overlays) using real-game reference recordings.
working_systems: Five built franchise worlds: Kingdom Hearts, Mario, Final Fantasy, Zelda, Naruto (heroes, rosters, items, customers, dungeon art)
Local 2-player split-screen with per-device input isolation and co-op dungeons
Controller support: D-pad movement, menu focus navigation, stick scroll, trigger zoom
Per-player consumable belts; every offered consumable has an implemented effect
Autosave every day-portion, loadable from the Continue menu
Core save/load, negotiation, inventory, economy, campaign, and combat logic
Data-driven content database (225 items, 85 enemies, 25 bosses, 8 heroes) with placeholder fallbacks
Development-only F1 Live Developer Hub core workflows

data/locations.json is empty; campaign scenes still build layouts in code
